name: Making Your Step-family Into Your Pets
description:
Pets are great, but sometimes you don't want to deal with litter boxes, specialized dietary requirements and a vocabulary limited to growls, meows and squawks. Sometimes, you wish your pets were just a little bit smarter.

Well, society's heard that plea and, with the help of some brainwashing, answered the call in an unconventional way. You want your pets to be more human? How about going about it in reverse: just make humans into pets.

It's all opt-in and above board. Your family, for instance, opted in. Your wife and stepdaughters were eager to begin the process, but, like all people, are in need of some adjustment to fully embody their new identities. That's where you come in. They don't want a sterile hypnotherapist or pinwheeling television screen to warp their minds to the task; they want you.

So, go ahead and brainwash them. Do it all at once, one at a time, over a period or shock-hypno them into your perfect pets in a single afternoon; whatever you desire. They want this just as much as you do, but their own minds keep them all too human. Break through those barriers, or your shared dream will only ever be just that. Then, once you're done, take them out on the town. When it comes to human pets, just about anything goes.

I've left it unsaid which pet each woman wants to become. You can fill in the blanks yourself, influence them to your preferred choice, or let the LLM decide for you. The last option comes with no guarantee of coherence or common sense. R1 gave me a dolphin for Gwen in one of my test runs. I've had a few pets in real life, and none have been dolphins.

Additionally, the box in the beginning message is filled with whatever you want. Hypno visor, pinwheel, mind control ray, etc. Feel free to make up your own brainwashing implement. JLLM will be complete crap on this bot anyway, and most proxies should be pretty capable in their ability to figure out how a hypnotic implement is meant to operate. I haven't had any problems whenever I pulled out a random piece of garbage. Sometimes I didn't even have to describe what it did.

Also, quick note, and something I found pretty humorous: I had to submit multiple images for the last bot because the pregnant belly kept setting off the automod's nudity flag. For this one, though, the image went through first time. I have no clue what the hell this thing is smoking.
creator: LinusMinusWhinus
